data.title: Vietnam’s crypto boom suffers an unfortunate fate
data.description:
Vietnam has seen its once high-thriving crypto industry become a shadow of itself after the recent marketwide decline in digital assets.

data.title: Solana’s RWA Ecosystem Reaches $1.66B as Tokenized Value Hits New High
data.description:
Solana’s real-world asset (RWA) segment has climbed to $1. 66 billion in tokenized value, marking a new all-time high for the network’s on-chain asset representation. The milestone reflects a steady acceleration throughout 2025, with growth compressing into a sharper expansion phase toward early 2026. The latest data shared by Solana shows cumulative tokenized value rising from […] The post Solana’s RWA Ecosystem Reaches $1
source: https://www.ethnews.com/solanas-rwa-ecosystem-reaches-1-66b-as-tokenized-value-hits-new-high/

data.title: Stablecoin Market Value Approaches Historical High Amid Bearish Sentiment
data.description:
Despite prevailing bearish sentiment in the crypto market, the total market value of stablecoins has been rising over the past two weeks, nearing previous historical highs. According to BlockBeats, data from DefiLlama indicates that the total market value of stablecoins is currently reported at $307.603 billion, marking a 1.85% increase over the past week.

Notably, USDC and USDS, issued by the Sky protocol, have shown significant growth over the past week, with increases of 1.18% and 3.23%, respectively. Meanwhile, the market share of USDT has fallen below 60%, currently standing at 59.74%.

data.title: Poland Considers Developing Nuclear Weapons Amid Russian Threat
data.description: Poland is contemplating the development of its own nuclear weapons due to increasing threats from Russia, according to President Karol Nawrocki. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Nawrocki's remarks during an interview with Polsat News television. The President emphasized the need for Poland to enhance its defense capabilities in response to regional security concerns. This consideration comes amid heightened tensions in Eastern Europe, as countries in the region reassess their security strategies.

data.title: Polymarket Sues Massachusetts Over Authority on Prediction Markets
data.description:
Polymarket sues Massachusetts, asserting federal authority over prediction markets, challenging state attempts to enforce gaming rules on event-based contracts.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/polymarket-sues-massachusetts-over-authority-on-prediction-markets/

data.description:

source: https://coincu.com/news/tokenized-gold-sees-18-9m-inflow-as-gold-tops-5000/

data.title: Asia's Crypto Landscape Experiences Regulatory and Innovation Milestones
data.description:
Asia's cryptocurrency sector has witnessed notable advancements in regulation and innovation this week. According to NS3.AI, Malaysia has launched pilot programs focusing on stablecoins and tokenized deposits, aiming to explore their potential in the financial ecosystem. Meanwhile, Thailand has taken a significant step by allowing digital assets to be used as collateral for derivatives, enhancing the utility of cryptocurrencies in financial transactions.

In Russia, cryptocurrencies have gained legal recognition as property, marking a pivotal moment in the country's approach to digital assets. This legal acknowledgment could pave the way for broader adoption and integration of cryptocurrencies within Russia's financial system.

Kyrgyzstan has reported an increase in tax revenues from cryptocurrency activities, indicating growing engagement and economic impact of digital currencies in the region. Additionally, Japan is making progress in utilizing stablecoins for securities settlements, which could streamline financial operations and increase efficiency in the securities market.

These developments highlight the dynamic nature of Asia's crypto landscape, as countries continue to adapt and innovate in response to the evolving digital economy.

data.title: Paypal Designates Solana as Default Network for Stablecoin Processing
data.description:
Payments giant PayPal has selected Solana as its default blockchain network to help process stablecoin transactions.
source: https://zycrypto.com/paypal-designates-solana-as-default-network-for-stablecoin-processing/

data.title: U.S. Universities Reevaluate Private Equity Investments Amidst Challenges
data.description:
Private equity investments are facing scrutiny from some of the wealthiest universities in the United States due to increasing competition and disappointing returns. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, highlighting that these institutions, which have traditionally relied on private equity for substantial growth, are reconsidering their strategies.

The crowded landscape of private equity has led to concerns about its effectiveness in delivering the high returns that universities have come to expect. As more players enter the market, the competitive environment has intensified, making it challenging for universities to achieve the desired financial outcomes.

Moreover, recent performance metrics have shown that private equity returns have not met expectations, prompting universities to explore alternative investment avenues. This shift reflects a broader trend of reassessment within the investment community, as stakeholders seek more reliable and lucrative options.

The move away from private equity is significant, given its historical role in boosting university endowments. However, the changing dynamics of the market are pushing these institutions to adapt and innovate in their investment strategies.

As universities navigate this transition, the focus is on balancing risk and reward while ensuring the sustainability of their financial portfolios. The evolving investment landscape underscores the need for strategic planning and diversification to safeguard future growth.

data.title: Increase in Attacks on Bitcoin Holders in France
data.description: Attacks on Bitcoin holders in France are on the rise, with a significant increase in incidents over the past year. According to PANews, reports indicate that out of 47 recorded attacks since 2017, 38 have occurred in the last 13 months. This surge suggests a sharp escalation in criminal activities targeting cryptocurrency holders.

data.title: Whale Address Reacquires AZTEC Tokens After Recent Sale
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 15, a whale address began repurchasing AZTEC tokens following a partial sale during the price surge on February 14. Over the past two days, the address has acquired AZTEC tokens worth $200,000. The total value of AZTEC held by this address now amounts to $1.1 million.

data.title: New Wallet Converts 9,156 ETH to Acquire 3,734 PAXG
data.description: Onchain Lens posted on X that a newly created cryptocurrency wallet has exchanged 9,156.45 ETH, valued at $18.87 million, to purchase 3,734.19 PAXG at a rate of $5,053 each. The transaction was identified through data from Nansen.ai, highlighting significant activity in the crypto market. The wallet address involved in this transaction is 0x53563b9ec34d016324d7cc41f66d7789167e8625.

data.title: An address spent $18.87 million to buy 3,734 PAXG tokens over the past two days.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, in the past two days, a newly created address (0x5356...8625) exchanged 9156.45 ETH for 3734.19 PAXG, with a total value of $18.87 million and an average purchase price of $5053.

data.title: Executives Express Growing Concerns Over AI Disruption in Earnings Calls
data.description: Executives are expressing heightened concerns about the potential disruption caused by artificial intelligence, as evidenced by a significant increase in mentions during recent earnings calls. Bloomberg posted on X that the frequency of AI-related discussions has nearly doubled in the latest quarter, reflecting the growing apprehension among business leaders. This surge in attention underscores the impact AI is expected to have on various industries, prompting companies to reassess their strategies and operations. As AI technology continues to evolve, executives are increasingly focused on understanding its implications and preparing for potential challenges. The rise in AI mentions highlights the urgency with which businesses are addressing this transformative technology.

data.description:
Key Takeaways: American Bitcoin Holdings now controls over 6,000 BTC.
source: https://coindoo.com/eric-trumps-american-bitcoin-expands-holdings-beyond-6000-btc/

data.title: UNESCO-Listed Argungu Fishing Festival Returns After Six Years
data.description: The Argungu Fishing Festival, recognized by UNESCO as an intangible cultural heritage, has resumed in Kebbi State, Nigeria, after a six-year hiatus. According to Ming Pao, the event drew significant attention when local fisherman Abubakar Usman caught a massive fish weighing 59 kilograms, becoming the highlight of the festival.

data.title: China Announces Visa-Free Entry for Canadian and British Citizens Starting 2026
data.description: China has decided to implement a visa-free policy for Canadian and British citizens holding ordinary passports, effective from February 17, 2026. According to Jin10, this initiative aims to facilitate easier travel and exchanges between China and these countries. The policy allows Canadian and British passport holders to enter China for business, tourism, family visits, and transit without a visa for stays of up to 30 days. This visa exemption will be in effect until December 31, 2026.

data.title: Ether holds as Buterin backs hedging-first markets
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin urges a shift from speculation to prediction markets hedging, interest-bearing collateral, CFTC regulation and fiat-free settlement, use cases.
source: https://coincu.com/news/ether-holds-as-buterin-backs-hedging-first-markets/
